entries.narrativeText:
went with @ Humphrey  and @Chester to @Coles @9:00 AM until @9:20AM.

then went to @hoyts norwood with +#Friends( Alice, Sunny, Emily) @6:00 PM for @2 hours.

After that went to @yochi norwood with @#Friends.
